name: AttributeCommands
summary: Tapir Add-On 'Attribute Commands' command group — 8 JSON-RPC commands.

methods.name: GetAttributesByType
methods.summary: Returns the details of every attribute of the given type.

methods.name: CreateLayers
methods.summary: Creates or overwrites Layer attributes based on the given parameters.

params.name: layerDataArray
params.doc: Array of data to create new Layers.

params.name: overwriteExisting
params.doc: Overwrite the Layer if exists with the same name, or if index is given with the same index. The default is false.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: CreateLayerCombinations
methods.summary: Creates or overwrites Layer Combination attributes based on the given parameters.

params.name: layerCombinationDataArray
params.doc: Array of data to create new Layer Combinations.

params.name: overwriteExisting
params.doc: Overwrite the Layer Combination if exists with the same guid/index/name. The default is false.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: CreateBuildingMaterials
methods.summary: Creates or overwrites Building Material attributes based on the given parameters.

params.name: buildingMaterialDataArray
params.doc: Array of data to create new Building Materials.

params.name: overwriteExisting
params.doc: Overwrite the Building Material if exists with the same name, or if index is given with the same index. The default is false.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: CreateComposites
methods.summary: Creates or overwrites Composite attributes based on the given parameters.

params.name: compositeDataArray
params.doc: Array of data to create Composites.

params.name: overwriteExisting
params.doc: Overwrite the Composite if exists with the same name, or if index is given with the same index. The default is false.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: CreateSurfaces
methods.summary: Creates or overwrites Surface attributes based on the given parameters.

params.name: surfaceDataArray
params.doc: Array of data to create new surfaces.

params.name: overwriteExisting
params.doc: Overwrite the Surface if exists with the same name, or if index is given with the same index. The default is false.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: attributeIds.

methods.name: GetBuildingMaterialPhysicalProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves the physical properties of the given Building Materials.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: properties.

methods.name: GetLayerCombinations
methods.summary: Returns the details of layer combination attributes.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: layerCombinations.
